title: Academy
subtitle: Fundamentals every serious player must master, from beginner to advanced.

math.title: Intuitive Math
math.desc: Pot odds, outs counting and call/fold, exercises generated from your own error spots.

board_strength.title: Hand Strength on the Board
board_strength.desc: Classify your hand and board texture. Knowing where you stand is the foundation of every post-flop decision.

position.title: Position Fundamentals
position.desc: Understand why position is the most persistent asset in poker and how it affects your realized equity.

math_intermediate.title: Equity & Rule of 2/4
math_intermediate.desc: Calculate equity with outs, use the 2/4 rule, and combine draws with pot odds without a calculator.

ranges.title: GTO Ranges: Open (RFI)
ranges.desc: Train just the opening decision: fold or raise by position and stack, graded against the solver ranges.

bet_sizing.title: Bet Sizing 101
bet_sizing.desc: Every wrong bet has an invisible cost. Learn the correct sizings and what each one communicates to opponents.

tournament.title: Tournament Context
tournament.desc: SPR & commitment, ICM on the bubble and FT, equity in 3-bet pots, spots where chip EV ≠ tournament EV.

ranges_advanced.title: GTO Ranges: Full
ranges_advanced.desc: Every situation: open, defense (call/3-bet) and vs 3-bet (4-bet/call), across stack depths.

multiway.title: Multiway Pots (3+ players)
multiway.desc: When more players enter the hand, the math flips: bluffs die, value tightens, bets shrink. Lesson with table and examples.

leakTrainer.title: Train where you lose EV
leakTrainer.subtitle: GTO spots aimed at your weak spots. Each spot adapts to how you do.
leakTrainer.empty: We don't have enough leaks yet to build your training. Import a few tournaments and come back, the trainer targets exactly where you lose EV.

gate.capDone: That's your training for today ({{used}} spots). Come back tomorrow, or train without limits with Pro.
gate.targetedDesc: You're training generic fundamentals. Targeting your real leaks (and postflop) is Pro.

summary.title: Session complete
summary.loopHint: Training preps you. Play a tournament and import it to see the effect on your real game.

lesson.title: New lesson
lesson.desc: {{count}} spots aimed at your leaks. Ready?

train_first.title: First correct
train_first.desc: You nailed your first training spot.

train_silver.title: Silver
train_silver.desc: Took a skill to Silver tier.

train_gold.title: Gold
train_gold.desc: Took a skill to Gold tier.

train_diamond.title: Diamond
train_diamond.desc: Took a skill to Diamond tier.

gtoPreflop.title: GTO Preflop Ranges
gtoPreflop.subtitle: Pick the GTO action in open, defense and 3-bet spots, graded against the solver ranges.

math.title: Intuitive Math
math.subtitle: Pot odds, outs and call/fold in your own error spots.

mathInt.title: Equity & Rule of 2/4
mathInt.subtitle: Calculate equity with outs and compare with pot odds without a calculator.

board.title: Hand Strength on the Board
board.subtitle: Accurately classify your hand and board texture.

tournament.title: Tournament Context
tournament.subtitle: SPR, ICM and decisions where chip EV ≠ tournament EV.
